category_sources: Official SourceForge homepage describes mcpp as a C/C++ preprocessor.
source_facts.description says mcpp is an alternative C/C++ preprocessor.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge homepage uses the project name mcpp.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge homepage says mcpp provides comprehensive documents and links to mcpp-summary.pdf.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no current official source-control project URL was identified from the official homepage, only SourceForge project/download surfaces.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge homepage says it implements C90, C99, and C++98 preprocessing and can be built as a command or library.
